subject: [tasks-system-redesign] [P4] Create TaskRow component with size variants
description:
Create the standard `TaskRow` component used everywhere tasks are displayed. Evolves from the renamed `TaskRow` (formerly `ScheduleRow`) by adding `size` and `showAgent` props. ## File location `apps/client/src/layers/features/tasks/ui/TaskRow.tsx` This replaces the existing renamed `TaskRow` (which is a direct rename of `ScheduleRow`). The new version has size variants. ## Props interface ```typescript import type { Task } from '@dorkos/shared/schemas'; import type { AgentManifest } from '@dorkos/shared/mesh-schemas'; interface TaskRowProps { task: Task; /** Resolved agent for the task, or null. */ agent?: AgentManifest | null; /** Display size variant. Default: 'default'. */ size?: 'default' | 'compact' | 'minimal'; /** Whether to show the agent column. Default: true. */ showAgent?: boolean; /** Whether the run history panel is expanded (default variant only). */ expanded?: boolean; onToggleExpand?: () => void; onEdit?: () => void; } ``` ## Variant behavior | Variant | Agent column | Cron/schedule info | Tags | Run history expand | Actions | |---|---|---|---|---|---| | `default` | If `showAgent` | Yes | Yes | Yes (collapsible) | Full dropdown: Edit, Run Now, Delete | | `compact` | If `showAgent` | Yes (inline) | No | No | Run button only | | `minimal` | No | No | No | No | None (display only) | ## New features (beyond the old ScheduleRow) ### File path indicator In the expanded state (default variant), show the task's `filePath` as a truncated monospace path below the run history: ```tsx {expanded && task.filePath && (
{task.filePath}
)} ``` ### Tags display Render tag chips below the cron description line when `task.tags.length > 0`: ```tsx {(size === 'default') && task.tags.length > 0 && (
{task.tags.map((tag) => ( {tag} ))}
)} ``` ### System badge If the associated agent has `isSystem: true`, render a "System" chip: ```tsx {agent?.isSystem && ( System )} ``` ### Status indicator Show the task status with appropriate colors: - `active` -> green dot - `paused` -> yellow dot - `pending_approval` -> orange dot ### Next run display For scheduled tasks (with cron), show the computed `nextRun` timestamp in a human-readable relative format (e.g., "in 2 hours"). ## Tests Create `apps/client/src/layers/features/tasks/__tests__/TaskRow.test.tsx`: 1. Test default variant renders all columns (name, cron, agent, tags, actions) 2. Test compact variant renders reduced columns (no tags, no expand, run button only) 3. Test minimal variant renders name only 4. Test `showAgent={false}` hides the agent column 5. Test tags render as badges when present 6. Test system badge renders when agent.isSystem is true 7. Test file path shows in expanded state 8. Test action dropdown has Edit, Run Now, Delete options (default variant) 9. Test status dot color matches task status ## Acceptance Criteria - `TaskRow` renders correctly in all three size variants - `showAgent` prop controls agent column visibility - Tags, file path, system badge, and status dot all render correctly - Actions dropdown works in default variant - Component is exported from the features/tasks barrel - All tests pass
activeForm: Creating TaskRow component with size variants
